info.title: StockX API - StockX非官方Restful API平台. StockX Unofficial Restful API platform
info.description:
### Description/简介

**[中文]**
- 这里是StockX非官方的Restful API平台。接口可支持所有球鞋卖家完成自动化交易等数字化需求。  
- 如果您有任何建议或者需求，请联系我。
- 您可在本页面查看接口参数及说明，也可通过`try it out`按钮进行接口调试。

**[English]**
- This is an unofficial Restful API platform for StockX. The interface can support all sneaker sellers to complete digital needs such as automated transactions.
- If you have any suggestions or needs, please contact me.
- You can view the interface parameters and descriptions on this page, or you can debug the interface through the `try it out` button.
***

### Contact/联系方式
- E-Mail: mocha_lee@qq.com
- 微信：TTF_TTF
- Discord: sting_lee
***

### Authorization/鉴权

**[中文]**
- 本平台所有接口都需要token参数，需找作者授权，有时效。
- **请联系我申请试用期。申请试用后，您将收到一个token，该token有效期为一周。在有效期内，您可以使用本平台的所有接口。**

**[English]**
- All interfaces of this platform require the token parameter, which needs to be authorized by the author and has a time limit.
- **Please contact me to apply for a trial period. After applying for the trial, you will receive a token, which is valid for one week. During the validity period, you can use all interfaces of this platform.**
***

### 关键参数说明/Key parameter description

**[中文]**
- token：为该平台的授权token，每个token都有有效期，有效期到期后token失效。由本平台开发者下发。
- auth：为stockx的设备ID，通过平台接口init_auth生成。
- access_token：为stockx的登录授权token，每个token都有有效期（12小时），有效期到期后token失效，需要通过平台接口update_access_token更新。
- refresh_token：为stockx的登录授权token，登陆后返回
- client_id：为stockx的client_id，登陆后返回
- auth0_client：为stockx的auth0_client，登陆后返回
- product_uuid/product_id/product_size_uuid：为stockx的商品ID/为stockx的具体size的商品ID，具体含义查看具体API的说明。
- order_id：为stockx的订单ID。
- chain_id：为stockx的链ID，每个商品上架后stockx生成一个chain_id，将伴随这个上架商品终身。
- cursor：为stockx的分页游标，每次请求返回的data中都有cursor，下次请求时将cursor作为参数传入即可翻页。

**[English]**
- token: The authorized token of the platform. Each token has a validity period and becomes invalid after the validity period expires. Issued by the developer of this platform.
- auth: Device ID for stockx, generated via the platform interface init_auth.
- access_token: Authorized token for stockx login. Each token has a validity period (12 hours). After the validity period expires, the token becomes invalid and needs to be updated through the platform interface update_access_token.
- refresh_token: stockx login authorization token, returned after login
- client_id: stockx's client_id, returned after login
- auth0_client: stockx's auth0_client, returned after login
- product_uuid/product_id/product_size_uuid: stockx's product ID/stockx's product ID for a specific size, see the specific API description for details.
- order_id: stockx's order ID.
- chain_id: stockx's chain ID, each product will generate a chain_id after it is put on the shelf, which will accompany the shelf product for life.
- cursor: stockx's paging cursor, each request returns cursor in data, and the next request will pass cursor as a parameter to turn the page.

### 注意事项/Attention

**[中文]**
- 所有接口都需要token参数。需找作者授权，有时效。
- 除init_auth外所有接口都需要auth参数，init_auth生成auth参数。
- access_token时效为12小时，过期后需通过update_access_token更新。

**[English]**
- All interfaces require the token parameter. It needs to be authorized by the author and has a time limit.
- All interfaces except init_auth require auth parameters, and init_auth generates auth parameters.
- The access_token is valid for 12 hours, and it needs to be updated through update_access_token after expiration.

get.summary: 搜索商品, 不需要登陆. Search for products. Don't need login.
get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 搜索商品. 不需要登陆.
## Function Description:
- Search for products. Don't need login.
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token，每个token都有有效期，有效期到期后token失效。由本平台开发者下发。
- auth：为init_auth接口返回的auth参数。
- keyword：为搜索关键词。一般为sku、鞋子名称、品牌等 。
- page：为页码，从1开始。
- country：为国家代码，默认为HK，如果你不知道你的country代码，可以通过接口`self_info`查询自己的`marketCountry`即可。
- category: 为商品分类，非必选，不选则查询所有分类。可选项为：sneakers, apparel, electronics, trading-cards, collectibles, accessories, nfts
- currency_code：为货币代码，默认为USD，可选项为：AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
## Parameter Description:
- token: is the authorization token for this platform, each token has a validity period, and the token becomes invalid after the validity period expires. Distributed by the developers of this platform.
- auth: is the auth parameter returned by the init_auth interface.
- keyword: is the search keyword. Generally, it is sku, shoe name, brand, etc.
- page: is the page number, starting from 1.
- country: is the country code, default is HK. If you don't know your country code, you can query your marketCountry through the interface `self_info`.
- category: is the product category, not required, if not selected, all categories will be queried. Optional values are: sneakers, apparel, electronics, trading-cards, collectibles, accessories, nfts
- currency_code: is the currency code, default is USD, optional: AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD

get.summary: 搜索运动鞋类目（高级），带所有筛选条件，不需要登陆. Search for sneakers category (advanced), with all filtering conditions. Don't need login.
get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 搜索`运动鞋`类目（高级），带所有筛选条件，不需要登陆.
## Function Description:
- Search for `sneakers` category (advanced), with all filtering conditions. Don't need login.
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token，每个token都有有效期，有效期到期后token失效。由本平台开发者下发。
- auth：为init_auth接口返回的auth参数。
- keyword：为搜索关键词。一般为sku、鞋子名称、品牌等 。
- page：为页码，从1开始。
- country：为国家代码，默认为HK，如果你不知道你的country代码，可以通过接口`self_info`查询自己的`marketCountry`即可。
- currency_code：为货币代码，默认为USD，可选项为：AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
- brand: 为品牌，非必选，不选则查询所有品牌。如有新品牌暂未包含，请联系管理员支持。
- gender: 为性别，非必选，不选则查询所有性别。(也即尺码类型)
- release_year: 为发布年份，非必选，不选则查询所有年份。如有年份暂未包含，请联系管理员支持。
- ask_price: 为价格区间，非必选，不选则查询所有价格区间。
- shoe_size: 为尺码，非必选，不选则查询所有尺码。如有尺码暂未包含，请联系管理员支持。
- sort: 为排序字段，非必选，不选则默认featured。可选项为：featured, most-active, recent_asks, recent_bids, average_deadstock_price, deadstock_sold, volatility, price_premium, last_sale, lowest_ask, highest_bid, release_date
- sort_order: 为排序顺序，非必选，不选则默认DESC。可选项为：DESC, ASC
## Parameter Description:
- token: is the authorization token for this platform, each token has a validity period, and the token becomes invalid after the validity period expires. Distributed by the developers of this platform.
- auth: is the auth parameter returned by the init_auth interface.
- keyword: is the search keyword. Generally, it is sku, shoe name, brand, etc.
- page: is the page number, starting from 1.
- country: is the country code, default is HK. If you don't know your country code, you can query your marketCountry through the interface `self_info`.
- currency_code: is the currency code, default is USD, optional: AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
- brand: is the brand, not required, if not selected, all brands will be queried. If there are new brands that are not included, please contact the administrator for support.
- gender: not required, if not selected, all genders will be queried. (i.e. size type)
- release_year: is the release year, not required, if not selected, all years will be queried. If there are years that are not included, please contact the administrator for support.
- ask_price: is the price range, not required, if not selected, all price ranges will be queried.
- shoe_size: is the size, not required, if not selected, all sizes will be queried. If there are sizes that are not included, please contact the administrator for support.
- sort: is the sorting field, not required, if not selected, the default is featured. Optional values are: featured, most-active, recent_asks, recent_bids, average_deadstock_price, deadstock_sold, volatility, price_premium, last_sale, lowest_ask, highest_bid, release_date
- sort_order: is the sorting order, not required, if not selected, the default is DESC. Optional values are: DESC, ASC

- sort_order: 为排序顺序，非必选，不选则默认DESC。可选项为：DESC, ASC

- auth: is the auth parameter returned by the init_auth interface.
- keyword: is the search keyword. Generally, it is sku, shoe name, brand, etc.

- brand: is the brand, not required, if not selected, all brands will be queried. If there are new brands that are not included, please contact the administrator for support.
- gender: not required, if not selected, all genders will be queried. (i.e. size type)

- model: is the model, not required, if not selected, all models will be queried. The specific optional parameters can be searched for `model` in the returned results after querying once with a selected brand.
- activity: is the activity, not required, if not selected, all activities will be queried. The specific optional parameters can be searched for `activity` in the returned results after querying once.
- mens_shoe_size: is the mens shoe size, not required, if not selected, all mens shoe sizes will be queried. The specific optional parameters can be searched for `mens-shoe-size` in the returned results after querying once.
- womens_shoe_size: is the womens shoe size, not required, if not selected, all womens shoe sizes will be queried. The specific optional parameters can be searched for `womens-shoe-size` in the returned results after querying once.
- lowest_ask_range: is the lowest ask range, not required. The parameter is like: range(0|1000), range(0|3700), range(1000|3700), etc.
- sort: is the sorting field, not required, if not selected, the default is featured. Optional values are: featured, most-active, recent_asks, recent_bids, average_deadstock_price, deadstock_sold, volatility, price_premium, last_sale, lowest_ask, highest_bid, release_date

post.summary: 通用高级搜索v2，支持所有品类. Universal advanced search v2, supports all categories.
post.description:
## 功能说明:
- 通用高级搜索v2接口，统一支持所有品类（sneakers、shoes、apparel、collectibles、electronics、accessories、trading-cards）。
- `gender_browse` 模式，用于按性别浏览（男/女/童），此时 gender 参数必传。
- `all_brands` 模式，用于获取 StockX 全部品牌目录(含name和alias)，选此项时其他参数均失效，仅需 token 和 auth。
- 通过 Body 中的 `extra_filters` 支持各品类特有的筛选参数（如产品线、型号、尺码等）。
## Function Description:
- Universal advanced search v2 interface, supports all categories.
- `gender_browse` mode for browsing by gender (men/women/kids), gender parameter is required in this mode.
- `all_brands` mode for fetching the complete StockX brand directory (name + alias). When selected, all other parameters are ignored, only token and auth are required.
- Supports category-specific filters via body `extra_filters` (e.g. product-line, model, shoe-size).
## Query 参数说明 / Query Parameters:
- token: 本平台授权token
- auth: init_auth接口返回的设备ID
- keyword: 搜索关键词，可为空
- category: 品类(必选)，可选值：sneakers, shoes, apparel, collectibles, electronics, accessories, trading-cards, gender_browse, all_brands
- currency_code: 货币代码，默认USD
- brand: 品牌(alias格式)，非必选，建议值参考品牌列表但不限制。如：nike, adidas, jordan, new-balance 等
- gender: 性别，非必选(gender_browse时必传)，建议值：men, women, kids, unisex
- lowest_ask_range: 最低出价范围，非必选，格式如 range(0|1000)
- sort: 排序字段，默认featured
- sort_order: 排序方向，默认DESC
- page: 页码，从1开始
## Body 参数说明 / Body Parameters (JSON):
- extra_filters: 额外筛选条件(JSON数组)，用于品类特有参数。格式: {"extra_filters": [{"id": "xxx", "selectedValues": ["xxx"]}]}
## extra_filters 常见示例 / Common extra_filters examples:
- 产品线(sneakers/shoes): `{"id": "product-line", "selectedValues": ["nike-air-force"]}`
- 型号(sneakers/shoes): `{"id": "model", "selectedValues": ["air-force-1"]}`
- 活动: `{"id": "activity", "selectedValues": ["basketball"]}`
- 男鞋尺码: `{"id": "mens-shoe-size", "selectedValues": ["US M 10"]}`
- 女鞋尺码: `{"id": "womens-shoe-size", "selectedValues": ["US W 8"]}`
## all_brands 模式说明:
- 当 category 为 `all_brands` 时，接口将返回 StockX 全部品牌目录，按字母分组，每个品牌含 name(展示名) 和 alias(接口传参用的标识)。
- 此模式下 keyword、brand、gender、lowest_ask_range、sort、sort_order、page、extra_filters 等参数均被忽略。

## 功能说明:
- 搜索`鞋类`类目（高级），带所有筛选条件，不需要登陆.
## Function Description:
- Search for `shoes` category (advanced), with all filtering conditions. Don't need login.
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token，每个token都有有效期，有效期到期后token失效。由本平台开发者下发。
- auth：为init_auth接口返回的auth参数。
- keyword：为搜索关键词。一般为sku、鞋子名称、品牌等 。
- page：为页码，从1开始。
- country：为国家代码，默认为HK，如果你不知道你的country代码，可以通过接口`self_info`查询自己的`marketCountry`即可。
- currency_code：为货币代码，默认为USD，可选项为：AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
- brand: 为品牌，非必选，不选则查询所有品牌。如有新品牌暂未包含，请联系管理员支持。
- gender: 为性别，非必选，不选则查询所有性别。(也即尺码类型)
- ask_price: 为价格区间，非必选，不选则查询所有价格区间。
- shoe_size: 为鞋码，非必选，不选则查询所有鞋码。如有鞋码暂未包含，请联系管理员支持。
- sort: 为排序字段，非必选，不选则默认featured。可选项为：featured, most-active, recent_asks, recent_bids, average_deadstock_price, deadstock_sold, volatility, price_premium, last_sale, lowest_ask, highest_bid, release_date
- sort_order: 为排序顺序，非必选，不选则默认DESC。可选项为：DESC, ASC
## Parameter Description:
- token: is the authorization token for this platform, each token has a validity period, and the token becomes invalid after the validity period expires. Distributed by the developers of this platform.
- auth: is the auth parameter returned by the init_auth interface.
- keyword: is the search keyword. Generally, it is sku, shoe name, brand, etc.
- page: is the page number, starting from 1.
- country: is the country code, default is HK. If you don't know your country code, you can query your marketCountry through the interface `self_info`.
- currency_code: is the currency code, default is USD, optional: AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
- brand: is the brand, not required, if not selected, all brands will be queried. If there are new brands that are not included, please contact the administrator for support.
- gender: not required, if not selected, all genders will be queried. (i.e. size type)
- ask_price: is the price range, not required, if not selected, all price ranges will be queried.
- shoe_size: is the shoe size, not required, if not selected, all shoe sizes will be queried. If there are shoe sizes that are not included, please contact the administrator for support.
- sort: is the sorting field, not required, if not selected, the default is featured. Optional values are: featured, most-active, recent_asks, recent_bids, average_deadstock_price, deadstock_sold, volatility, price_premium, last_sale, lowest_ask, highest_bid, release_date
- sort_order: is the sorting order, not required, if not selected, the default is DESC. Optional values are: DESC, ASC

get.summary: 通过GTIN搜索商品, 不需要登陆. Search for products by GTIN. Don't need login.
get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 通过GTIN搜索商品. 不需要登陆.(GTIN是球鞋鞋盒上的条形码编号)
## Function Description:
- Search for products by GTIN. Don't need login. (GTIN is the barcode number on the shoe box)
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token，每个token都有有效期，有效期到期后token失效。由本平台开发者下发。
- auth：为init_auth接口返回的auth参数。
- gtin：为GTIN码。一般为球鞋鞋盒上的条形码编号。比如: "194276371053"
- country：为国家代码，默认为HK，如果你不知道你的country代码，可以通过接口`self_info`查询自己的`marketCountry`即可。这个参数会影响到结果中的市场数据，比如价格。
- currency_code：为货币代码，默认为USD，可选项为：AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
## Parameter Description:
- token: is the authorization token for this platform, each token has a validity period, and the token becomes invalid after the validity period expires. Distributed by the developers of this platform.
- auth: is the auth parameter returned by the init_auth interface.
- gtin: is the GTIN code. Generally, it is the barcode number on the shoebox. For example: "194276371053"
- country: is the country code, default is HK. If you don't know your country code, you can query your marketCountry through the interface `self_info`. This parameter will affect the market data in the result, such as price.
- currency_code: is the currency code, default is USD, optional: AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD

get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 指定商品的历史销售记录。不需要登录. (该接口指定区域不生效，建议使用下面的新接口product_activity_new和product_size_activity_new)

- Historical sales records of specified products. Don't need login. (This API does not take effect in the specified area, it is recommended to use the new API `product_activity_new` and `product_size_activity_new` below)
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token，每个token都有有效期，有效期到期后token失效。由本平台开发者下发。
- auth：为init_auth接口返回的auth参数。
- product_uuid：为商品的uuid，可以通过search_product接口获取。
- country：为国家代码，默认为HK，如果你不知道你的country代码，可以通过接口`self_info`查询自己的`marketCountry`即可。
- currency_code：为货币代码，默认为USD，可选项为：AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD
## Parameter Description:
- token: is the authorization token for this platform, each token has a validity period, and the token becomes invalid after the validity period expires. Distributed by the developers of this platform.
- auth: is the auth parameter returned by the init_auth interface.
- product_uuid: is the uuid of the product, which can be obtained through the search_product interface.
- country: is the country code, default is HK. If you don't know your country code, you can query your marketCountry through the interface `self_info`.
- currency_code: is the currency code, default is USD, optional: AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD

- end_date：为查询范围的结束日期，格式为`2020-01-01`，可不填，默认为当前日期。

- start_date: is the start date of the query range, the format is `2020-01-01`, which can be left blank, the default is "all" means all time.
- end_date: is the end date of the query range, the format is `2020-01-01`, which can be left blank, the default is the current date.
- intervals: is the number of data points queried, the default is 100, that is, 100 data points are taken between start_date and end_date.
- currency_code: is the currency code, default is USD, optional values are: AUD, CAD, CHF, EUR, GBP, HKD, JPY, KRW, MXN, NZD, SGD, USD

- status=1001：验证码错误。

- price：价格（单位：元，如200）。

get.summary: 获取Kickscrew collections列表. Get Kickscrew collections list.
get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 获取 Kickscrew 网站的 collections 列表数据（基于 Marqo 搜索引擎接口）。
## Function Description:
- Get Kickscrew collections list data (based on Marqo search engine API).
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token。
- collection_name：collection标识（必填），从下拉列表中选择，如 `shop-for-men`、`shop-for-kids`、`backpack-bags` 等。
- offset：偏移量（可选），默认 0。用于分页，如第2页传 32。
- limit：每页数量（可选），默认 32。
- release_year：发布年份筛选（可选），支持多值用逗号分隔，如 `2026,2025`。
- price_range：价格区间筛选（可选），如 `0-100`、`100-200`。
## Parameter Description:
- token: Authorization token for this platform.
- collection_name: Collection identifier (required), select from dropdown list, e.g. `shop-for-men`, `shop-for-kids`, `backpack-bags`.
- offset: Offset (optional), default 0. For pagination, e.g. pass 32 for 2nd page.
- limit: Page size (optional), default 32.
- release_year: Release year filter (optional), supports multiple values separated by commas, e.g. `2026,2025`.
- price_range: Price range filter (optional), e.g. `0-100`, `100-200`.

## 功能说明:
- SASOM 非官方 API 登录，使用 Firebase signInWithPassword 认证。
- 登录成功后返回完整的 Firebase 响应，包含 idToken、localId、refreshToken 等全部字段。
- 调用方需保存 idToken（作为 access_token）和 localId（作为 local_id），后续接口使用这两个参数调用。
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token。
- email：SASOM 账号邮箱。
- password：SASOM 账号密码。

get.summary: SASOM 获取寄存商品清单（单页）
get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 获取 SASOM 寄存商品（pre-verified / ready-to-ship）清单，支持分页。
- 需要先调用登录接口获取 access_token 和 local_id。
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token。
- access_token：登录返回的 idToken。
- local_id：登录返回的 localId。
- cursor：翻页游标，首次请求传空字符串或不传，后续使用上次返回的 nextCursor。
- limit：每页数量，默认 500。
## 返回说明:
- data.data.groupBy：按 SKU-condition-equipment 分组的商品列表。
- data.data.next：是否有下一页。
- data.data.nextCursor：下一页游标。

post.summary: SASOM 寄存商品批量改价
post.description:
## 功能说明:
- 批量修改 SASOM 寄存商品（pre-verified / ready-to-ship）的价格。
- 需要先调用登录接口获取 access_token 和 local_id。
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token。
- access_token：登录返回的 idToken。
- local_id：登录返回的 localId。
- groups：改价列表，每个元素包含：
    - sku：商品货号（如 M2002RDA）。
    - condition：状态（如 brand_new）。
    - size：尺码（如 5.5）。
    - details：详情（如 {"DETAILS_BOX": true}）。
    - price：原价（整数，单位泰铢）。
    - newPrice：新价（整数，单位泰铢）。
    - order_ids：订单ID列表。
## 返回说明:
- data.success：是否成功。
- data.order_ids_updated：成功更新的订单ID列表。

get.summary: SASOM 获取商品尺码最低价（公开接口）
get.description:
## 功能说明:
- 获取 SASOM 指定商品各尺码的最低价信息（公开接口，无需 SASOM 账号登录）。
- 返回商品基本信息及每个尺码的 lowest_ask、highest_bid_order、bid_suggest、best_price 等。
## 参数说明:
- token：为本平台的授权token。
- sku：商品 SKU 编码。
## 返回说明:
- data：包含 name, category, brand, sku, images, size_meta 等字段。
